text:
Tsukuma (ツクマ, Tsukuma) is a former police officer who survived an attack from a Chimera Ant named Bloster by "only" losing his right eye, and both of his legs. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 22, Chapter 224 

Appearance

Tsukuma has a muscular build. He has a defined jawline and slightly prominent cheekbones, which confer a gaunt appearance to his cheeks. He has a thin upper lip, a straight nose, and light-colored eyes. He was only seen wearing a hospital gown, bandages around the top of his head and right eye and ear, and a bandage on his left cheekbone. As a result of running into Bloster, he lost his right eye and both legs. 

Personality

Despite losing his right eye and becoming paraplegic; Tsukuma maintained a calm composure during his interview with a news reporter about his encounter with Bloster during his rampage. 

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

Interviewed by a news station, Tsukuma detailed his encounter with the Chimera Ant Bloster, whom he describes as an enormous shrimp.

Battles

Trivia

Manga and Anime Differences

Tsukuma does not appear in the 2011 anime adaptation.
